creator: fk@fabiankeil.de
text:
I'm not opposed to backporting patches but I've been using updated liferea versions for a while now and haven't experienced any crashes yet:

2022-10-03T09:09:04.844408+02:00 t520.local pkg <13>1 46895 - - liferea upgraded: 1.13.8_1 -> 1.13.9 
2022-12-29T16:36:20.911319+01:00 t520.local pkg <13>1 97288 - - liferea upgraded: 1.13.9 -> 1.14.r3 
2023-02-01T10:01:27.754962+01:00 t520.local pkg <13>1 41204 - - liferea upgraded: 1.14.r3 -> 1.14.0
